name: cenH_element_mat_locus
description: cenH element within the S. pombe silent mat locus on chromosome II. ~4.3 kb sequence between mat2-P and mat3-M that is homologous to the centromeric dg/dh repeats. cenH is the seed for RNAi-Clr4-dependent H3K9 methylation across the mat silent island; reads from cenH multi-map to all otr arms of cen1/cen2/cen3.
expected_copy_count: 1 cenH copy in mat locus + homology to dg/dh in all three otrs
